criteria.label: Implementation Effort
criteria.description: Time and resources required to deploy the CRM system.

criteria.label: Integrations
criteria.description: Ability to connect with existing tools and systems.

criteria.label: Features
criteria.description: Presence of required functionalities like AI lead scoring.

criteria.label: Subscription Cost
criteria.description: Monthly or annual licensing fees for the CRM platform.

criteria.label: Migration Cost
criteria.description: Costs associated with data migration and system transfer.

criteria.label: Total Cost of Ownership
criteria.description: Sum of all direct and indirect costs over the contract period.

criteria.label: GDPR Compliance
criteria.description: Adherence to EU data protection regulations.

criteria.label: Vendor Stability
criteria.description: Financial and operational reliability of the vendor.

criteria.label: Lock-In Risk
criteria.description: Difficulty in switching to alternative solutions.

criteria.label: Data Residency
criteria.description: Location of data storage and processing.
